NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}."}],"AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount(address,bytes32)":[{"details":"The `account` is missing a role."}]},"events":{"RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"details":"Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted to signal this."},"RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call. This account bears the admin role (for the granted role). Expected in cases where the role was granted using the internal {AccessControl-_grantRole}."},"RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)"}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"addController(address)":{"details":"To add dedicated manager role","params":{"_controller":"of new rate)","params":{"_isin":"ISIN string","_maturityDuration":"Duration in seconds from bond distribution until maturity","_offering":"Total supply ceiling (offering size) for this partition"}},"decimals()":{"returns":{"decimalsValue":"Number of decimals."}},"enableByIsin(string,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Restricted to CONTROLLER_ROLEFor RATE auctions, _couponYield should be to be activeIncreases the total offering ceiling for the partition","params":{"_additionalOffering":"Additional offering size to add to the partition","_isin":"ISIN maturity"}},"getRoleAdmin(bytes32)":{"details":"Returns the admin role that controls `role`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeOperator(address)":{"params":{"operator":"Address to revoke."}},"revokeOperatorByPartition(bytes32,address)":{"params":{"operator":"Address to revoke.","partition":"Partition identifier."}},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. ,"dweb:/ipfs/Qmax9WHBnVsZP46ZxEMNRQpLQnrdE4dK8LehML1Py8FowF"]},"dependencies/@openzeppelin-contracts-5.3.0/utils/introspection/ERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0xddce8e17e3d3f9ed818b4f4c4478a8262aab8b11ed322f1bf5ed705bb4bd97fa","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8084aa71a4cc7d2980972412a88fe4f114869faea3fefa5436431644eb5c0287","dweb:/ipfs/Qmbqfs5dRdPvHVKY8kTaeyc65NdqXRQwRK7h9s5UJEhD1p"]},"dependencies/@openzeppelin-contracts-5.3.0/utils/introspection/IERC165.sol":{"keccak256":"0x79796192ec90263f21b464d5bc90b777a525971d3de8232be80d9c4f9fb353b8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f6fda447a62815e8064f47eff0dd1cf58d9207ad69b5d32280f8d7ed1d1e4621","dweb:/ipfs/QmfDRc7pxfaXB2Dh9np5Uf29Na3pQ7tafRS684wd3GLjVL"]},"src/common/Errors.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7405405b96d6b4b57d111cb96d97350698608d8f6f4ce97e5731bb3795a7303a","license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://14568d15cefcd02f7aab524937800c91c9297a6d08ea1bb060a35fcb3bce5374","dweb:/ipfs/QmZUQYaYH3aCxC1hQC2QPxs6Uw4rBaeL3SsHJuZ8RjGxfJ"]},"src/common/Roles.sol":{"keccak256":"0x71c7368376794207a3e693b67cf622474be115f08514ce43ec8e2ebef0693015","license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://5b80e7478e856d7e6739fee37cd8001320e48d67f672b86f5646d6607a97b386","dweb:/ipfs/QmNSXXnXqUTKxamdUgeJzjkz49KhZUxs1Z7AXR4cU6RupL"]},"src/norges-bank/BondToken.sol":{"keccak256":"0xacc9801f213832cfe669e9b4d7a2f7954413eda5dcb3ac2618eb0968c03951ca","license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://cee4284732cf2f7fcceb60da05af6bcff6d30f0a957cacf2a6a08947eb006c10","dweb:/ipfs/QmV51kMujU25JcXRb7NVmX3XPCr7afHBotbDwFLY46sKba"]},"src/norges-bank/ERC1410/ERC1410.sol":{"keccak256":"0x42fbfbf8b101f0155817c5da3dd5bacf37050e079f17e611832aeef92b728b15","license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://5733951f27c67840ddbeb2b4638bd55a230123aa3adb8ff7d411288e7840d32b","dweb:/ipfs/QmeNVELEYxRrtpthdYPLB8Go66vqYcWGuggLmfgfth6Efz"]},"src/norges-bank/ERC1410/IERC1410.sol":{"keccak256":"0x506fabd53dacfe6f0e07669dc6d02412d7d6c8a3290d8a9e54a8e61bc1f1b5de","license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://8a8490a075f2a845cfc0bcb22aaa203157fb8a82905994d7517b1682c7856055","dweb:/ipfs/QmXX5rgMR3Md7cMXMkocwM1o82EsUguoMUHw3TkVyuTLva"]},"src/norges-bank/interfaces/IBondToken.sol":{"keccak256":"0xc2358bed1e9e3fd15711864c12002cba03717b5685d1f186c2c446d711d55d6f","license":"Apache-2.0","urls":["bzz-raw://13b35e34c47de6aa8cb8ddb20ec2eb74f06f6ac7a581c723448c8ea274ef83f4","dweb:/ipfs/Qmd6A8HEtTfgjWnGBs3wyh1t7bUbyzvUhJHCreTQmZL3ZH"]}},"version":1}

params._operator: Address with CONTROLLER_ROLE executing the burn

createPartition(string,uint256,uint256).details: This explicitly creates the partition in the ERC1410 tracking before any real mintingSets the partition as active in the activePartitions mapping and stores the offering size and maturity durationCoupon parameters are set later via setCouponParameters (for RATE auctions, yield comes from clearing rate)

params._maturityDuration: Duration in seconds from bond distribution until maturity
params._offering: Total supply ceiling (offering size) for this partition

enableByIsin(string,uint256,uint256).details: Restricted to CONTROLLER_ROLEFor RATE auctions, _couponYield should be the clearing rate from the auction (with 4 decimal places)Number of coupon payments = maturityDuration / _couponDuration

params._couponDuration: Coupon internal in seconds (e.g., 1 year = durationScalar)

extendPartitionOffering(string,uint256).details: Requires partition to be activeIncreases the total offering ceiling for the partition

params._additionalOffering: Additional offering size to add to the partition

returns._couponDuration: Interval between coupon payments in seconds

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

returns.granularityValue: Granularity value (must be a divisor of all transfers).

returns.isCtrl: True if operator is a controller.

mintByIsin(string,address,uint256).details: Requires partition to be activatedValidates that minting does not exceed the partition's offering size (total supply ceiling)

redeemFor(address,string,uint256,address.details: Validates maturity and burns bondsWNOK payment is handled via mock DVP in BondManager using REDEEM_EOARestricted to CONTROLLER_ROLE

params._holder: Address holding the bonds to be redeemed and receiving WNOK payment
params._operator: Address with BOND_MANAGER_ROLE performing the redemption

reducePartitionOffering(string,uint256).details: Requires partition to be activeReduces the total offering ceiling for the partitionEnsures the reduction doesn't make offering less than current supply

params._reductionAmount: Amount to reduce from the offering size

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

transferByPartition(bytes32,address,uint.details: If `data` is 32 bytes long, it is treated as the destination partition.

UNIT_NOMINAL().notice: Each bond unit represents this nominal value in WNOK (e.g., 1 BOND = 1000 WNOK)

activePartitions(bytes32).notice: Mapping to track active partitions (ISINs that have been activated)

authorizeOperator(address).notice: Authorize an operator for all partitions of the caller.

authorizeOperatorByPartition(bytes32,add.notice: Authorize an operator for a specific partition.

balanceOf(address).notice: Get total balance for a holder across all partitions.

balanceOfByPartition(bytes32,address).notice: Balance of a holder within a specific partition.

buybackRedeemFor(address,string,uint256,.notice: Burn bonds before maturity for buyback flows

constructor.notice: Constructor initializes ERC1410 token with bond-specific settings

couponDuration(bytes32).notice: Mapping to track coupon duration (number of payment intervals) per partition

couponPaymentCount(bytes32).notice: Mapping to track number of coupon payments made per partition

couponYield(bytes32).notice: Mapping to track coupon yield (percentage) per partition

createPartition(string,uint256,uint256).notice: Create a partition for an ISIN (initializes partition without minting)

extendPartitionOffering(string,uint256).notice: Extend the offering size for an existing partition

getCouponDetails(string).notice: Get all coupon details for a partition in a single call

granularity().notice: Minimum transferable unit for the token.

isController(address).notice: Check if an address is a controller.

isMatured(bytes32).notice: Mapping to track if bond is matured (after final coupon payment) per partition

isinToPartition(string).notice: Convert ISIN string to partition bytes32

lastCouponPayment(bytes32).notice: Mapping to track last coupon payment timestamp per partition

maturityDate(bytes32).notice: Mapping to track maturity date per partition (timestamp when bonds can be redeemed)

maturityDuration(bytes32).notice: Mapping to track maturity duration per partition (seconds until maturity from distribution)

operatorTransferByPartition(bytes32,addr.notice: Operator transfer respecting global and partition-level approvals.

partitionOffering(bytes32).notice: Mapping to track total supply ceiling (offering size) per partition

partitionToIsin(bytes32).notice: Retrieve ISIN string for a partition.

partitionsOf(address).notice: Enumerate partitions held by an address.

redeemFor(address,string,uint256,address.notice: Redeem bonds from a specific ISIN partition for WNOK

reducePartitionOffering(string,uint256).notice: Reduce the offering size for an existing partition (used when auction is cancelled)

revokeOperator(address).notice: Revoke operator access for all partitions of the caller.

revokeOperatorByPartition(bytes32,addres.notice: Revoke operator access for a specific partition.

setMatured(string).notice: Mark bond as matured (called after final coupon payment)

totalPartitions().notice: All partitions that currently have non-zero supply.

totalSupplyByPartition(bytes32).notice: Total supply for a given partition.

transferByPartition(bytes32,address,uint.notice: Transfer value from the caller out of a partition.

updateCouponPayment(string,uint256,uint2.notice: Update coupon payment tracking (called by BondManager after coupon payment)
